title: App crash report
description: Generates a chronological text report of every application crash / hang / Windows Error Reporting event (faulting application, module, and exception code live in the message) from an Event Log. Runs on demand from the Processor Output page.

sections.name: CrashReport
sections.description: Write one entry per crash / hang to a text report

rules.name: emit-crash-report
rules.match: Faulting application name:|stopped interacting with Windows|Fault bucket|unhandled exception|Application Hang|Application Error
